meta.note: [provenance:hand-derived §6.14 + AOZORA-ANNOTATION 2026-07-01] ルビは「X」にかかる is a ruby-binding editorial note — a proofreading marker that a nearby ruby applies to the run X (disambiguation, not renderable ruby). The body starts with ルビは (no leading quote), so the forward-reference recognizers decline and it reaches the editorial-note tail; classified as editorial kind ruby-retarget. Bracket-only consumption; §8 renders a compact <sup class="aozora-ruby-note">ルビ</sup> marker. Serialize re-emits the raw bracket byte-exact. Offsets from the §4 byte model (each fullwidth char = 3 bytes); cross-checked against the reference processor.
